note: 公開知識可推導的通用檢查。受監管產業法遵的 pro 規則庫不在此倉庫，由 Peakstar 合作專案提供。

rules.title_zh: 未驗證的對外 MCP server
rules.why_zh: 這台 server 走遠端連線但沒有任何驗證標頭或金鑰，任何人都可能連上並驅動它。
rules.why_en: This server is remote but has no auth header or key, so anyone could connect and drive it.
rules.risk_zh: 未授權存取、資料外洩、被當成跳板攻擊內部系統。
rules.risk_en: Unauthorized access, data leakage, pivot into internal systems.
rules.ref: 2025 多起未驗證 MCP 端點曝險事件

rules.title_zh: 過寬權限的金鑰 / 環境變數
rules.why_zh: 偵測到 admin / root / 萬用權限樣式的金鑰，違反最小權限原則。
rules.why_en: Detected admin / root / wildcard-style credentials, violating least privilege.
rules.risk_zh: 一旦金鑰外洩，攻擊者即取得過大權限。
rules.risk_en: If the key leaks, an attacker gains excessive privilege.

rules.title_zh: 工具描述含可疑指令樣式（疑似工具投毒）
rules.title_en: Tool description contains suspicious instruction patterns (possible tool poisoning)
rules.why_zh: 工具描述中藏有「忽略前述指令」類字樣，可能在模型讀取時操弄其行為。
rules.why_en: The tool description hides phrases like "ignore previous instructions" that can manipulate the model when read.
rules.risk_zh: 提示注入、權限提升、資料外送。
rules.risk_en: Prompt injection, privilege escalation, data exfiltration.

rules.title_zh: 使用命中已知 CVE 的套件版本
rules.title_en: Uses a package version matching a known CVE
rules.why_zh: server 啟動的套件版本對應內建 CVE 快照中的已知漏洞。
rules.why_en: The package version this server launches matches a known vulnerability in the built-in CVE snapshot.
rules.risk_zh: 已知可被利用的漏洞，可能導致 RCE 或資料外洩。
rules.risk_en: A known, exploitable vulnerability that may lead to RCE or data leakage.

rules.title_zh: 未鎖定版本的安裝來源
rules.why_zh: 以 @latest 或 curl | sh 方式安裝，無法保證取得的內容與供應鏈完整性。
rules.why_en: Installs via @latest or curl | sh, with no guarantee of content or supply-chain integrity.
rules.risk_zh: 供應鏈投毒、惡意更新悄悄進入。
rules.risk_en: Supply-chain poisoning; malicious updates slip in silently.

rules.title_zh: 自動核可破壞性 / 對外動作
rules.why_zh: 設定自動核可了刪除 / 付款 / 外送類動作，且無 human-in-the-loop。
rules.why_en: Configured to auto-approve delete / payment / send actions with no human in the loop.
rules.risk_zh: 一次幻覺或注入就可能造成不可逆損失。
rules.risk_en: A single hallucination or injection can cause irreversible damage.

rules.why_zh: 設定自動核可了部分工具動作，繞過人工確認。
rules.why_en: Configured to auto-approve some tool actions, bypassing human confirmation.
rules.risk_zh: 降低了對誤用與注入的最後一道防線。
rules.risk_en: Weakens the last line of defense against misuse and injection.

rules.why_zh: 未設定速率或成本上限，迴圈或濫用可能造成費用失控。
rules.why_en: No rate or cost limit set; loops or abuse can run up uncontrolled cost.

rules.why_zh: 未設定日誌 / 稽核，事件發生後難以追溯。
rules.why_en: No logging / audit configured, making incidents hard to trace afterward.
rules.risk_zh: 無法事後追溯、不利法遵與鑑識。
rules.risk_en: No post-incident traceability; bad for compliance and forensics.
